author: danielknopik
content: Cell Level Deltas now in Lighthouses `unstable` 🚀

author: danielknopik
content: <@412614104222531604> I suggest you keep the devnet pointed at my branch though, so I can use it to push any fixes/improvements before they hit `unstable`

author: marcopolo__
content: <@1000001410538151996> is fix for the full data column traffic running on blob-devnet-0?

author: danielknopik
content: yeah, but the effect is not as I expected, so I am investigating further

author: danielknopik
content:
Ok, the remaining traffic seems to only related to the non-partial-messages nodes running outside of the network. 

I do not have an explanation why LH seems have more traffic to those nodes than prysm. Maybe one of the things to investigate next week.

author: danielknopik
content: On the bright side - LH seems to have these nodes in its mesh still after days of almost only partial message activity, so non-partial messages nodes seem to survive in an otherwise partial message only network. Good to know.

author: danielknopik
content: Seeing that most of the times, cells "win the race" as per marcos dashboard, we also do not survive only because of those nodes

author: danielknopik
content: I fear that for pure partial messages networks we have to stick to local devnets and simulations
